tasks.label: Open Swagger (Docker SQL)
args: for ($i = 0; $i -lt 60; $i++) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://localhost:7600/swagger' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; Start-Process 'https://localhost:7600/swagger'; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } }

tasks.label: Open Swagger (LocalDB)
args: for ($i = 0; $i -lt 60; $i++) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://localhost:7600/swagger' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; Start-Process 'https://localhost:7600/swagger'; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } }
